eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Nance, NE; at 10:52 AM ON APR 14, 2026 Effective until 12:52 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Emergency Bottled Water. Bottled water will be distributed today between 1:00 - 3:00 at the old fire hall located at 512 Willard. This is for Genoa residents only.
